description_long: This object consists of two dark green, cylindrical bomb-like devices with pointed noses and black, finned tails. The bodies are metallic and feature yellow stenciled text, suggesting military or ordnance markings. The tail sections are ribbed and equipped with stabilizing fins, likely for aerodynamic stability during flight. The nose cones are smooth and slightly tapered, with one appearing to have a small circular indentation or fuse at the tip. The overall construction is robust, with a seamless transition between the main body and the tail assembly. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light, and the object appears heavy and solid, typical of explosive ordnance.
description: A pair of dark green, metallic bombs with yellow markings, pointed noses, and black finned tails for stabilization.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of both bombs, highlighting the yellow text and the ribbed, finned tails.
description_view_1: Nose-on view displaying the pointed tips and the symmetry of the fins at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the length, body curvature, and tail fin structure.
description_view_3: Tail-on view emphasizing the circular arrangement of the stabilizing fins and the ribbed tail sections.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The object appears to have a fuse or impact-initiated detonation mechanism at the nose, with no visible external switches or wires.
